posts.author: SianCTA (Sian)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there an automation that will copy long text into a Monday Doc?

I’m trying to Zap a meeting summary from Read.ai into Monday.
I have a board with meetings created by an automation with Calendly.
Following the meeting, transcribed by Read.ai, I want the summary sent to that meeting - which Zapier can do. But it can’t create or update a Monday Doc.

So I thought the workaround could be that it creates a long text, then with an automation, there might be some way of copying and pasting it into a Monday Doc.

Any suggestions?
Thanks

Btw - pretty new at this so might be missing a trick

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SianCTA, Welcome to the community!

There’s no native monday.com automation that can take content from a Long Text column and push it into a monday Doc.

A simple workaround that works well is to have Zapier send the meeting summary as an Update on the item instead this keeps everything tied to the meeting.

If you’re on Pro or Enterprise, you can also try a workflow where an update triggers adding content to a Doc. However, this is limited since it typically adds content to a single Doc.

If you specifically need it in a monday Doc, you can explore doing it via the monday API (using Zapier Webhooks or Make) to create or update the Doc.
